sourcesContent:
export const ProductsData = [
  {
    Images: [
      { image: "/images/Product1/HisteriaMaxEaten.png" },
      { image: "/images/Product1/HisteriaMax1.png" },
      { image: "/images/Product1/HisteriaMax2.png" },
      { image: "/images/Product1/HisteriaMax3.png" },

    ],
    title: "Histeria Max",
    description:
      "crispy wafer coated with rich milk chocolate & bar of rich white chocolate. crispy wafered",
    ingredients:
      "Sugar, Cocoa butter substitutes. Vegetable fat (palm), cocoa mass, cocoa powder, Skimmed-milk powder, whole milk powder, Soy lecithin, wheat flour, raising agents (bicarbonate sodium), Vanilla, Salt.",
    weight: "40g",
    packing: "12 peices per box",
  },

  {
    Images: [
      { image: "/images/Product1/HugyMooshDarkEaten.png" },
      { image: "/images/Product1/HugyMooshDark1.png" },
      { image: "/images/Product1/HugyMooshDark2.png" },
      { image: "/images/Product1/HugyMooshDark3.png" },

    ],
    title: "Hugy Moosh Chocolate",
    description:
      "A real cocoa crispy biscuit Coated with Chocolate Cream for on the go relish",
    ingredients:
      "Sugar, Cocoa butter substitutes. Vegetable fat, cocoa mass, cocoa powder, Skimmed-milk powder, whole milk powder, Soy lecithin, wheat flour, raising agents",
    weight: "60g",
    packing: "24 peices per box",
  },
  {
    Images: [
      { image: "/images/Product1/HugyMooshWhiteEaten.png" },
      { image: "/images/Product1/HugyMooshWhite1.png" },
      { image: "/images/Product1/HugyMooshWhite2.png" },
      { image: "/images/Product1/HugyMooshWhite3.png" },
    ],
    title: "Hugy Moosh Milk",
    description:
      "crispy wafer coated with rich milk chocolate & bar of rich white chocolate.",
    ingredients:
      "Sugar, Cocoa butter substitutes. Vegetable fat (palm), cocoa mass, cocoa powder, Skimmed-milk powder, whole milk powder, Soy lecithin, wheat flour, raising agents (bicarbonate sodium), Vanilla, Salt.",
    weight: "40g",
    packing: "12 peices per box",
  },
];
